captions.p3_hybrid:
A close-up of a dark bowl filled with steaming rice soup, featuring bean sprouts, yellow mung bean sprouts, sliced green onions, and a rich brown broth, with a spoon partially submerged. The scene conveys a fresh, appetizing casual meal.  
Search keywords: rice soup, bean sprouts, mung bean sprouts, green onions, broth, spoon, bowl, meal, casual dining

The photo shows a close-up of a cast-iron skillet filled with a vibrant, spicy Korean dish featuring bean sprouts, yellow beans (likely soybeans), and marinated meat in a rich red sauce, served at an outdoor market or street food stall. Visible surroundings include a bright yellow chair, a red plastic seat, and a metal container with Korean text, creating a casual, bustling dining atmosphere.  

Search keywords: Korean street food, cast-iron skillet meal, spicy meat and bean sprouts, market stall setting, Korean text on container, soybeans and bean sprouts.

A steaming pot of spicy Korean-style stew features layers of meat slices, tofu, green peppers, and onion rings in a bubbling, reddish broth. The vibrant ingredients and rising steam create a warm, appetizing scene.  

Search keywords: Korean hot pot, spicy stew, steaming broth, meat slices, tofu, green vegetables, bubbling pot

A black plate displays fresh salmon sashimi topped with bright orange fish roe, accompanied by wasabi, shredded white radish, and vibrant microgreens, while a person holds chopsticks near a wooden table in a restaurant setting. The scene captures an appetizing seafood dish with vivid colors and fresh garnishes.  
Search keywords: salmon sashimi, fish roe, wasabi, daikon radish, microgreens, chopsticks, restaurant dish, wooden table

Raw pork chunks rest on a metal grill above glowing red coals, surrounded by small bowls of red sauce and a spice mixture on a stainless steel countertop. The scene captures a vibrant, ready-to-cook barbecue setup with fresh ingredients and visible grilling elements.  

Search keywords: raw pork, metal grill, glowing coals, red sauce, spice mixture, barbecue preparation, stainless steel countertop

A close-up shot of a hot stone pot filled with shredded roasted chicken featuring glossy, caramelized skin and steaming white rice, arranged in a sizzling cast-iron dish. The meal appears freshly prepared, with golden-brown chicken pieces mixed with rice, creating an appetizing and warm dining scene.  

Search keywords: roasted chicken, stone pot rice, shredded chicken, sizzling dish, restaurant meal.

The photo shows a person with shoulder-length dark hair wearing a white top, standing near a window with a softly blurred outdoor backdrop of green foliage and red flowers, creating a calm, natural atmosphere.  

Search keywords: outdoor portrait, shoulder-length hair, white top, window background, garden greenery, red flowers, soft natural lighting.

A person wearing glasses and a light blue shirt captures a selfie from an elevated position, overlooking a reservoir with wind turbines along the shoreline and surrounding hilly terrain. The landscape features mixed green and brown hills under a bright sky, with "KON" visible on the cap.  

Search keywords: selfie, reservoir, wind turbines, hilly landscape, glasses, light blue shirt, outdoor scenery, KON cap

Two people pose closely for a selfie indoors, each making a peace sign; one holds a phone while the other wears a light blue shirt with a colorful floral collar. The background is dark and indistinct.  
Search keywords: selfie, two people, peace sign, phone, light blue shirt, floral collar, dark background

Six individuals pose together on a sunny grassy field with a clear blue sky, some standing and one sitting, against a backdrop of distant traditional structures. Their casual outdoor attire includes jackets, hats, and sneakers, with the sun creating lens flares on the left side of the image.  

Search keywords: group photo, sunny field, casual outdoor clothing, lens flares, traditional structures, cheerful mood

A person rides a dark horse with white markings through a sparse forest of tall, leafless trees under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds, while the dry, rocky ground is dotted with fallen tree trunks and sparse vegetation.  

Search keywords: horse riding, forest trail, tall leafless trees, dry rocky ground, blue sky, saddle pad, cool season.

A person in a white shirt stands on a dark concrete breakwater overlooking a calm, deep blue sea, with a distant rocky outcrop visible on the horizon. The serene coastal scene features large cylindrical concrete structures in the foreground and soft light enhancing the tranquil mood.  

Search keywords: concrete breakwater, sea, person, rocky outcrop, calm ocean, coastal landscape, serene mood, concrete structures, ocean horizon.

A misty mountain landscape with layered hills partially shrouded in fog, foregrounded by dense green vegetation and wild plants, under a pale sky with soft clouds hinting at dawn or dusk, evokes a serene and ethereal mood.  

Search keywords: misty mountains, foggy hills, green vegetation, dawn landscape, atmospheric fog

A multi-lane urban highway flows past dense green trees, with cars moving along the road and modern skyscrapers—including a prominent white high-rise labeled “101”—rising in the skyline under a bright, clear sky. The scene captures a vibrant city atmosphere with visible road signs and infrastructure.  

Search keywords: urban highway, moving vehicles, white high-rise 101, domed building, green trees, city skyline, road signs, sunny day.

A quiet paved road lined with tall, slender trees and streetlights stretches into the distance under a soft blue sky with scattered clouds, capturing a tranquil moment during early morning or late afternoon light. The scene feels peaceful with minimal vehicle activity, as a truck sits parked on the left amid the surrounding greenery.  
Search keywords: road, trees, streetlights, clouds, sky, truck, dawn/dusk, quiet landscape, rural road, empty highway, road sign

Two people walk along a modern elevated walkway with repeating rectangular frame structures, heading toward a distant city skyline under a bright, partly cloudy sky.  

Search keywords: elevated walkway, pedestrian bridge, structural frames, city skyline, partly cloudy sky, walking

A computer monitor displays a DBMS Viewer application with a data grid containing Korean text entries (e.g., "일반국도", "지방도", "기타") across rows numbered 0-9, accompanied by toolbars featuring options like "Data Grid" and "Auto Trace". Part of a white keyboard with a visible "6" key is seen to the right of the screen, suggesting active database management.  

Search keywords: computer screen, DBMS Viewer, Korean data grid, numbered rows 0-9, keyboard with 6 key, data management UI

The image shows a Windows command prompt window displaying continuous ping results to www.google.com, with visible text including the IP address 173.194.38.84, packet sizes (32 bytes), response times (e.g., 36ms, 1270ms), and TTL=52 values in a mix of English and Korean text, set against a dark terminal background.  

Search keywords: Windows command prompt, ping test, network diagnostics, Google ping results, Korean text, IP address 173.194.38.84, terminal screen.

A dimly lit scene shows an LG laptop screen displaying the CentOS 6 boot splash, with the text "CentOS 6" and a loading spinner visible against a dark background. The screen's glow illuminates the surrounding cluttered area, though details remain indistinct due to low light.  

Search keywords: CentOS 6 boot screen, LG laptop, Linux boot process, dim lighting

The image shows a computer monitor displaying a Korean-language after-sales service (A/S) center information page, with a taskbar at the bottom containing browser and application icons. The screen lists service items, business hours, contact details, and a "Door to Door" service note, visible through the monitor’s typical LCD glow effects.  

Search keywords: computer monitor, A/S service center, Korean text, service hours, contact information, desktop taskbar, Door to Door service, phone number, address.

A computer monitor shows a Linux terminal with Java application stack traces, process listings (including "ps -ef | grep app.file"), shell commands like "kill -9 16046", and Java version output ("java version '1.6.0.02'"), while blurred office items and a white game controller with a "9" button appear below the screen. The scene depicts a technical troubleshooting session in a workspace setting with text highlighting system errors and shell interactions.

Search keywords: computer monitor, Linux terminal, Java stack trace, terminal commands, game controller, office desk

A narrow alleyway in a Korean neighborhood shows a man pushing a small cart, with stacked red plastic chairs and a table on the left, while overhead mesh canopies with blue and green stripes hang between buildings; Korean storefront signs and crisscrossing power lines frame the quiet, everyday scene under an overcast sky.  
Search keywords: Korean alley, market street, red plastic furniture, overhead mesh canopy, Korean storefront signs, power lines, man with cart.

An open cardboard box on a wooden floor is filled with multiple "reskin" and "TS SOAP" product packages, some featuring a black-and-white photograph of a person with styled hair. The scene depicts a casual arrangement of branded items in an indoor setting.  
Search keywords: reskin, TS SOAP, cardboard box, product packaging, black-and-white image, wooden floor, indoor setting

A green glass bottle of Jinro Gold soju (360mL, featuring red labeling with Korean characters and "JINRO GOLD") sits prominently on a white surface, surrounded by white disposable cups printed with "Have a Good Time" and a blue-capped water bottle, suggesting a casual social gathering.  

Search keywords: soju bottle, Jinro Gold, 360mL, Korean soju, disposable cups, "Have a Good Time", green glass bottle, social gathering.

A refrigerator drawer holds an assortment of green and dark-colored bottles, including what seem to be alcoholic drinks and condiments, with some labels featuring Korean text and partial English wording. The bottles are neatly arranged in molded compartments within the fridge’s interior.  

Search keywords: fridge drawer, green bottles, Korean labels, alcoholic beverages, condiment bottles, refrigerator storage

A supermarket shelf features stacked packages of Valvitalia Sfoglie pastries (hazelnut and strawberry cream varieties), surrounded by other snacks like Deka Crepes and MarketO cookies, with Korean price tags showing 2,000 won. The bright, commercial setting highlights colorful packaging and clear product imagery.  

Search keywords: Sfoglie pastries, Valvitalia, hazelnut cream, strawberry cream, Korean supermarket shelf, snack packages, 2000 won price tags, Deka Crepes, MarketO cookies.
